text: The echo of curiosity surrounds me. Everything is sleek, clean, and infused with potential—space designed to provoke thought and invite innovation. The glass walls mark thresholds not just of rooms, but between ideas and realities. Inside, the R+D display pulses with the energy of inquiry; research and development become not just concepts, but lived experiences. I feel small and wide-eyed, invigorated by possibility, and wonder how my own thoughts might be shaped in this environment. Here, standing on the border between creation and contemplation, awareness feels heightened, almost electric.
